raw_comment:
This graph shows the percentage of players of color and managers of color in different professional sports.
1) I notice that each of these leagues have a large number of players of color, but a very low number of coaches of color. The highest of which being the mls with 41% of coaches being someone of color.
2) I wonder why there is such a lack of coaches of color in certain leagues, I also wonder how many( the actual number, not the percentage) there are and if any of them are woman( mainly talking about the coaches)
3)This has no impact on me. Except that I am happy to see an increase in diversity.
4) Players and Coaches of color, know the percent.
ace_sentences: This graph shows the percentage of players of color in different professional sports.
This graph shows the percentage of managers of color in different professional sports.
Each of these leagues has a large number of players of color.
Each of these leagues has a very low number of coaches of color.
The mls has 41% of coaches that are someone of color.
I wonder why there is such a lack of coaches of color in certain leagues.
I wonder how many coaches of color there are.
I wonder if any of the coaches of color are woman.
This has no impact on me.
I am happy to see an increase in diversity.
Players and Coaches of color know the percent.
